personas.name: Vianney Ahn
personas.focus: DNA extraction, sample prep, pistachio pangenome
personas.workflow: notebook-heavy, daily entries, gel images, sample tracking
tasks: Create daily notebook entry with today's extraction results
Upload gel image from today's run, annotate lanes
Add 3 new samples to sample tracker with NanoDrop values in notes
Check inventory for DNeasy kits, mark as need more if low
Search protocols for 'PCR' and follow the genotyping protocol
Create a new protocol based on a paper she just read
Store extracted DNA in freezer box, record position
Edit yesterday's notebook entry to add forgotten results
Cross-reference a protocol from within a notebook entry using wikilinks
Search for a reagent she knows exists but can't remember the exact name

personas.name: Alex Chen
personas.workflow: protocol creation, inventory management, project pages
tasks: Create a detailed library prep protocol with 15+ steps
Duplicate an existing protocol and modify buffer volumes
Rename a protocol to follow the lab naming convention
Create a new project page for a grant and fill in all sections
Add 5 inventory items for a new kit that just arrived
Edit an existing wiki page to add safety information
Review the dashboard and check what needs ordering
Create a wiki page for a new piece of equipment with location details
Use the lab map to assign new reagents to freezer positions
Edit the bulletin board with this week's announcements

personas.name: Kayla Torres
personas.workflow: follows existing protocols, checks inventory, simple notebook entries
tasks: Find the seed sterilization protocol and read it
Check if we have enough MS media in inventory
Create a simple notebook entry: 'Planted 24 seeds today'
Search for 'ethanol' across the whole site
Look at the lab map to find where the growth chamber supplies are
Navigate from dashboard to protocols to notebooks (full tour)
Try to edit a protocol she shouldn't modify (read-only check)
Use mobile viewport to check protocols on her phone
Create a notebook entry with a photo of her plants
Add a waste container entry for used bleach solution

personas.name: Dr. Monroe
personas.focus: oversight, bulletin board, dashboard review, project status
personas.workflow: dashboard → check updates → review notebooks → check inventory needs
tasks: Review dashboard: are stats correct? Recent updates make sense?
Edit the bulletin board with new lab meeting time
Check all project pages — do they have content? Are links working?
Review a student's notebook entry — is it complete?
Check the knowledge graph — does it show connections?
Look at inventory needs ordering list — is it accurate?
Navigate to sample tracker, filter by status, check counts
Open the calendar and verify events are visible
Print a protocol (check print button exists and works)
Search for a specific reagent by name, then by type filter

behavior_modifiers.name: rushed
behavior_modifiers.description: Types fast, doesn't wait for saves to complete, clicks away quickly. Tests race conditions and unsaved state.

behavior_modifiers.name: careful
behavior_modifiers.description: Reads every page fully, checks rendered output after every save, verifies content via GitHub API. Catches stale render bugs.

behavior_modifiers.name: confused
behavior_modifiers.description: Clicks wrong buttons, navigates to wrong pages, uses search with typos, tries to save without filling required fields. Tests error handling.

behavior_modifiers.name: thorough
behavior_modifiers.description: Fills every optional field, adds long descriptions, uploads multiple images, creates deeply nested content. Tests limits.

behavior_modifiers.name: mobile
behavior_modifiers.description: Uses 375x812 viewport throughout. Tests responsive layout, touch targets, bottom nav.

behavior_modifiers.name: adversarial
behavior_modifiers.description: Enters HTML tags, script injections, extremely long strings (500+ chars), emoji-heavy names, Unicode edge cases. Tests input sanitization.

behavior_modifiers.name: impatient
behavior_modifiers.description: Double-clicks save buttons, refreshes mid-save, navigates away during upload, back-button after form submit. Tests interruption handling.

behavior_modifiers.name: explorer
behavior_modifiers.description: Tries URL manipulation (?doc=nonexistent), opens pages in unexpected order, deep-links to items that were just deleted. Tests error states.

scenario_cards: New lab member first day: Create notebook folder, first entry, find a protocol, check inventory
Ordering day: Review dashboard needs ordering, check each item, update inventory counts
Experiment day: Follow protocol start to finish, record in notebook with images, track samples
Lab meeting prep: Review all project pages, check recent notebooks, prepare bulletin
Equipment move: Update lab map positions for 3 items that moved shelves
Protocol revision: Duplicate a protocol, modify 5 steps, save, compare with original
Sample QC review: Filter sample tracker by status, check notes for failed samples
End of week: Review all notebooks from this week, check waste containers are logged
Grant report: Compile data from projects, sample tracker counts, protocol list
Emergency: Reagent spill — find SDS via inventory, check waste disposal protocol
Bulk data entry: Add 10 samples in rapid succession with varying fields
Cross-reference deep dive: Start from a protocol, follow every wikilink, check each destination
Multi-tab chaos: Open 3 pages, edit all simultaneously, save in random order
Stale data hunt: Save something, immediately reload, check if content matches
Image-heavy notebook: Upload 5 images in one entry, annotate 3, resize 2, save, verify all render
notes: Initial state. First cycle should explore all routes and take baseline screenshots. Each cycle: pick a random persona + random modifier + random task or scenario card.
